commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: No automated repair is needed; the remaining action is maintainer/plugin-owner approval of the compatibility-sensitive hook placement change.; Cleared: The diff only changes embedded agent runtime prompt splitting and tests, with no dependency, workflow, secret, install, or supply-chain surface touched. (sha=133f57660a68a99da7c0370d251eb748799ca15e)
commands.review_summary:
This PR changes the embedded runner runtime-context split so `before_prompt_build` `prependContext`/`appendContext` remain in the model prompt while marked internal runtime context and inter-session provenance stay hidden, with focused regression tests.

PR surface: Source +70, Tests +74. Total +144 across 4 files.

Reproducibility: yes. Current main and the latest release show `resolveRuntimeContextPromptParts()` removing text around `transcriptPrompt` into `runtimeContext`, which source-reproduces the linked hook-context placement bug without needing a live channel run.
commands.review_followup: No automated repair is needed; the remaining action is maintainer/plugin-owner approval of the compatibility-sensitive hook placement change.

target.title: fix(agents): keep hook context in embedded prompts
target.body:
## Summary
- keep `before_prompt_build` `prependContext`/`appendContext` in the embedded runner model prompt when `transcriptPrompt` is present
- continue stripping marked OpenClaw internal runtime-context blocks into hidden runtime context messages
- update context-engine regression coverage so transcript/UI text stays raw while hook context remains prompt-local

Fixes #86849.

## Real behavior proof
- **Behavior or issue addressed:** Embedded-runner `before_prompt_build` `prependContext`/`appendContext` must remain in the model prompt when a separate persisted `transcriptPrompt` exists, while marked internal runtime context stays hidden.
- **Real environment tested:** Local OpenClaw checkout at PR head `133f57660a68`, Linux, Node `v22.22.0`, runtime module `src/agents/pi-embedded-runner/run/runtime-context-prompt.ts` executed through `node --import tsx`.
- **Exact steps or command run after this patch:** Ran the real exported `resolveRuntimeContextPromptParts()` with `transcriptPrompt: "visible ask"` and a `modelPrompt` containing hook prepend/append text plus a marked internal runtime-context block.
- **Evidence after fix:** Terminal output from the runtime command:

```text
environment=node v22.22.0 platform=linux
head=133f57660a68
{
  "prompt": "dynamic hook context\n\nvisible ask\n\ndynamic hook tail",
  "runtimeContext": "<<<BEGIN_OPENCLAW_INTERNAL_CONTEXT>>>\nsecret runtime context\n<<<END_OPENCLAW_INTERNAL_CONTEXT>>>"
}
promptHasHookPrefix=true
promptHasHookTail=true
promptHasInternalContext=false
hiddenHasInternalContext=true
```

- **Observed result after fix:** `prompt` retained both hook strings around the visible ask, excluded `secret runtime context`, and `runtimeContext` retained the marked internal block for hidden handling.
- **What was not tested:** No browser/channel UI rendering was run manually; the integration regression covers raw transcript/UI text remaining separate from prompt-local hook context.

## Verification
- `git diff --check origin/main...HEAD`
- `OPENCLAW_VITEST_MAX_WORKERS=1 node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/agents/pi-embedded-runner/run/runtime-context-prompt.test.ts src/agents/pi-embedded-runner/run/attempt.spawn-workspace.context-engine.test.ts --pool forks --maxWorkers=1 --reporter=tap`
- `pnpm check:changed`
target.author: alix-007

commands.reason: PR is not opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
